LightningComponentBundle.description: Queries UST_Portal_Widget__c for the configured zone and page, then renders matching widgets in sort order. Place one per zone on each Experience Cloud page.

property.name: zoneName
property.label: Zone Name
property.description: Zone this instance covers. Matches Zone__c picklist: body, sidebar, banner, above_footer.

property.name: pageContext
property.label: Page Context
property.description: Page slug to filter widgets. Matches Page_Context__c: home, events, giving, profile, directory, news. Use 'all' for all-page widgets.
